clusters.summary: Out of memory error during aggregation
Failed to read ETL output for ds_007

explanation:
INCIDENT SUMMARY
================
Root Cause Service : analytics
Failure Type       : a service crash
Affected Services  : reporting

WHAT HAPPENED
-------------
The analytics service experienced a service crash. Because downstream services
depend on analytics, failures cascaded to: reporting.

EVIDENCE (sample log messages)
-------------------------------
  [analytics] Out of memory error during aggregation
  [analytics] Analytics service terminated unexpectedly
  [analytics] Out of memory error during aggregation
  [analytics] Analytics service terminated unexpectedly
  [analytics] Analytics service terminated unexpectedly

RECOMMENDED REMEDIATION
------------------------
  1. Increase memory allocation for the analytics worker.
  2. Check for unbounded aggregation queries causing OOM.
  3. Restart the analytics service and monitor memory usage.
